title: Siva Sivaaya Potriye Lyrics Baahubali (Tamil)
stanzas:
Siva sivaaya potriye
namachivaaya potriye
pirapparikkum yaegane
porutharul anegane

paramporul un naamathai
karam kuvithu paadinom
irappinil un kaalgalai
siranguvithu thedinom

yaaru ivan yaaru ivan
kalla thookki poraane
pulla pola tholu mela
unna thookki poraane

kannu rendu podhala
kaiyyi kaalu odala
Gangaiyathaan
thaedikittu thannathaane
sumandhu kittu
lingam nadanthu poguthe

ellai illaadha aadhiye
ellaam unardha sothiye
malai magazh un paadhiye
kalai magazh un kaidhiye

arulvallaan emarpudhan
arumporul em aruchidham
thunai virumbum uthaman
uruvila en ruthiran

olir vidum en dhesane
kulir malai than vaasane
azhil migu en nesane
azhitholikkum eesane

nillaamal aalum andhame
kallaagi nirkkum unthame
kallaa yengatku sondhame
ellaa uyirkkum andhame

yaaru ivan yaaru ivan
kalla thookki poraane
pulla pola tholu mela
unna thookki poraane

kannu rendu podhala
kaiyyi kaalu odala
Gangaiyathaan
thaedikittu thannathaane
sumandhu kittu
lingam nadanthu poguthe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Siva Sivaaya Potriye?

The song is a devotional tribute, praising Lord Shiva and expressing deep reverence.

How does this song fit into the plot of Baahubali?

It reflects the spiritual journey and the themes of devotion present in the movie.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Maragatha Mani and Vaikom Vijayalakshmi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the renowned MM Keeravani.

When was Siva Sivaaya Potriye released?

The song was released on June 24, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Siva Sivaaya Potriye, the song serves as a powerful devotional anthem that resonates with the themes of spirituality and reverence in Baahubali. The lyrics evoke a deep sense of devotion, celebrating the divine qualities of Lord Shiva. The harmonious blend of Maragatha Mani and Vaikom Vijayalakshmi's voices creates an uplifting experience, making it perfect for spiritual gatherings and celebrations. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of faith and devotion, leaving listeners with a profound emotional impact.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Siva Sivaaya Potriye from Baahubali is a mesmerizing blend of soulful melodies and powerful vocals. Featuring the unique collaboration of Maragatha Mani and Vaikom Vijayalakshmi, this song captures the essence of devotion and reverence. With MM Keeravani's enchanting composition, it resonates deeply with listeners, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Praise to Lord Shiva, we chant His name, He is the one who brings forth everything.
We sing your name, the ultimate truth, in the cycle of life, we seek your feet.
Who is this person? Who is this person? Like a child, he lifts you up, like a flower, he carries you.
With two eyes and hands, the feet are like the Ganges, searching for the essence, the divine form moves forward.
Without boundaries, the beginning is your awareness, the mountain is your half, the prison is your art.
The one who gives grace, our essence, the purest thing, the one who desires goodness, in my blood.
My land shines brightly, the cool mountain is fragrant, my beloved is so beautiful, He removes all darkness.
Without the moon, the world stands still, your presence is everything, it is the essence of all life.
Who is this person? Who is this person? Like a child, he lifts you up, like a flower, he carries you.
With two eyes and hands, the feet are like the Ganges, searching for the essence, the divine form moves forward.
